'''yalaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabank|seabank]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabank|seabank]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yalaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yælæhæth|yælæhæth]] || [[word:yælæhæj|yælæhæj]] || [[word:yælæhæsh|yælæhæsh]] || [[word:yælæhæ|yælæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yalalahath|yalalahath]] || [[word:yalalahaj|yalalahaj]] || [[word:yalalahash|yalalahash]] || [[word:yalalaha|yalalaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yalahath|yalahath]] || [[word:yalahaj|yalahaj]] || [[word:yalahash|yalahash]] || [[word:yalaha|yalaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yalafhath|yalafhath]] || [[word:yalafhaj|yalafhaj]] || [[word:yalafhash|yalafhash]] || [[word:yalafhaf|yalafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yalahatha|yalahatha]] || [[word:yalahaja|yalahaja]] || [[word:yalahasha|yalahasha]] || [[word:yalahaka|yalahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yalahath|yalahath]] || [[word:yalahaj|yalahaj]] || [[word:yalahash|yalahash]] || [[word:yalaha|yalaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yalahathal|yalahathal]] || [[word:yalahajal|yalahajal]] || [[word:yalahashal|yalahashal]] || [[word:yalahakal|yalahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yalahathatha|yalahathatha]] || [[word:yalahajaja|yalahajaja]] || [[word:yalahashasha|yalahashasha]] || [[word:yalahaka|yalahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yalahathan|yalahathan]] || [[word:yalahajan|yalahajan]] || [[word:yalahashan|yalahashan]] || [[word:yalahakan|yalahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yalahathaoro|yalahathaoro]] || [[word:yalahajaoro|yalahajaoro]] || [[word:yalahashaoro|yalahashaoro]] || [[word:yalahakaoro|yalahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
